title: Forwarding client IP address is security-sensitive
description: Forwarding client IP address is security-sensitiveAnalyze your codeintentionality-completesecuritySecurity Hotspotprivacyexpress.jsUsers often connect to web servers through HTTP proxies.Proxy can be configured to forward the client IP address via theX-Forwarded-FororForwardedHTTP headers.IP address is a personal information which can identify a single user and thus impact his privacy.Ask Yourself WhetherThe web application uses reverse proxies or similar but doesn’t need to know the IP address of the user.There is a risk if you answered yes to this question.Recommended Secure Coding PracticesUser IP address should not be forwarded unless the application needs it, as part of an authentication, authorization scheme or log management for examples.Sensitive Code Examplenode-http-proxyvar http
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Forwarding client IP address is security-sensitive. Ensure this is necessary and complies with privacy requirements.
Enabling proxy trust can expose client IP addresses. Review security implications.
